race.comment: MADALSA (8) did a good job last start to finish third at this track over 1625m, beaten 1.2 lengths. Should be at her peak now. Has been in solid form this campaign with a win and a placing from three starts and is expected to feature prominently. MATAWAI (5) showed little early speed last start and failed to come on in the straight when eighth, beaten 6 lengths, over 1680m at Ipswich. Tackling a more suitable race this time so she is a major player. INDY ROSE WARRIOR (9) last start finished fifth at this track over 1300m after she was well back on straightening. Placed to advantage so expect a bold run. GOLDEN LOOM (7) value at odds.
